title: Slovakian Potato Dumplings with Italian Twist
description: A creative take on traditional Slovakian potato dumplings with an Italian twist, featuring a light and fluffy texture and a crispy fried exterior.
instructions: Boil the grated potatoes in salted water until they're slightly tender.
Drain the potatoes and mash them with a fork.
Add the Slovakian dumplings to the mashed potatoes and mix well.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato-dumpling mixture into the hot oil and flatten slightly.
Fry the dumplings until they're golden brown on both sides.
Remove the fried dumplings from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Sprinkle the grated Parmesan cheese over the fried dumplings.
Serve the Slovakian potato dumplings hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
